mapper.select: select sch.seq , sch.start_time AS startTime , tr.status FROM TB_CS_TRAIN_SCHEDULE sch LEFT JOIN TB_CS_TRAIN tr ON sch.seq = tr.schedule_seq WHERE sch.start_time BETWEEN DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL -1 MONTH), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AND DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') order by sch.start_time

SELECT SUM(a.cnt) FROM ( SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM TB_CS_TRANS_PAIR WHERE model_id IS NOT NULL AND model_id = '' union SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM TB_CS_TEST_TRANS_PAIR WHERE model_id IS NOT NULL AND model_id = '' ) a
SELECT EXISTS ( SELECT * FROM TB_CS_TRAIN_SCHEDULE WHERE start_time = #{startTime})
select SEQ AS seq , name , model_id AS modelId , is_success as isSuccess , detail , status from TB_CS_TRAIN WHERE model_id = #{modelId}
select data_id as dataId , test_yn as testYn , use_yn as useYn , duration , train_text as trainText from TB_CS_TRAIN_SERVER where test_yn = #{testYn} order by data_id

select SEQ , start , end , reliability , stt_text as sttText , train_text as trainText , data_id AS dataId , use_yn as useYn from TB_CS_TRANSCRIPTION where data_id is not null and data_id != '' order by data_id

select SEQ , start , end , reliability , trim(IF(train_text IS NULL or train_text = '', stt_text, train_text)) as trainText , data_id AS dataId , use_yn as useYn from TB_CS_TEST_TRANS where data_id is not null and data_id != '' order by data_id

select s.data_id as dataId , s.test_yn as testYn , s.use_yn as useYn , s.duration as duration , s.train_text as trainText , t.use_yn as tUseYn , round((t.end - t.start), 2) as tDuration , t.train_text as tTrainText , t.sound_seq as tRelSeq , 'E' AS mode from TB_CS_TRAIN_SERVER s join TB_CS_TRANSCRIPTION t on s.data_id = t.data_id where s.test_yn = 'N' order by s.data_id

select s.data_id as dataId , s.test_yn as testYn , s.use_yn as useYn , s.duration as duration , s.train_text as trainText , s.t_use_yn as tUseYn , s.t_duration as tDuration , s.t_train_text as tTrainText , 'E' AS mode from TB_CS_TRAIN_SERVER s where s.rel_seq = -1 and s.mode = 'E' and s.use_yn = 'Y' order by s.data_id

select s.data_id as dataId , s.test_yn as testYn , s.use_yn as useYn , s.duration as duration , s.train_text as trainText , t.use_yn as tUseYn , round((t.end - t.start), 2) as tDuration , trim(IF(t.train_text IS NULL or t.train_text = '', t.stt_text, t.train_text)) as tTrainText , t.use_yn as tUseYn , t.test_seq as tRelSeq , 'E' AS mode from TB_CS_TRAIN_SERVER s join TB_CS_TEST_TRANS t on s.data_id = t.data_id where s.test_yn = 'Y' order by s.data_id
